step_rationale: IgG receptor amplifying platelet activation and immune complex signaling.
mechanism: Fc receptor on platelets mediating immune-complex-driven platelet aggregation and thrombotic amplification.

references.title: Variation in platelet expression of FcγRIIa after myocardial infarction.
Mucor circinelloides induces platelet aggregation through integrin αIIbβ3 and FcγRIIA.
Heparin-induced thrombocytopenia/thrombosis in a transgenic mouse model requires human platelet factor 4 and platelet activation through FcgammaRIIA.
